title: GraphQL
excerpt: description: Set up a GraphQL server on Cloudflare Pages using the GraphQL Pages Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The GraphQL Pages Plugin creates a GraphQL server which can respond to `application/json` and `application/graphql` `POST` requests. It responds with [the GraphQL Playground ↗](https://github.com/graphql/graphql-playground) for `GET` requests. yarn add @cloudflare/pages-plugin-graphql
